subcodes.first_line: God willing, thou hast ever been and wilt ever remain the recipient of divine favours, and illumined by the light of His countenance. Strive thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال بعنایات الهیه فائز باشی و بانوار وجه منور جهد نما
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
